questions.question: Write a step-by-step explanation of the Insertion Sort algorithm and its time complexity. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Focus on the key elements of the algorithm and its efficiency

questions.question: Compare and contrast Bubble Sort and Selection Sort algorithms, highlighting their differences in time complexity and space complexity. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Provide examples to support your answer

questions.question: Given an array of 20 integers, calculate the average time complexity of Insertion Sort to sort the array. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Use the formula for time complexity (O(n^2)) and explain your reasoning
